description: seance main window: listen for backend-emitted log events and call the two read-only commands the app exposes (backfill = snapshot of the joined timeline; status = which log files exist + skipped-line count). No fs plugin, no shell, no http, no dialog, no updater — the webview has zero file API surface. All file access is backend-owned std::fs reads (see src/lib.rs), so a compromised webview cannot read, write, or enumerate any file; it can only receive the records the backend chose to emit.
